creator: @daniel_de_bruin
caption:
Putting LEDS into used motor oil is just magical!

A throwback to 2019 when I was experimenting with this process. I ended up making 3 versions of this work but this round version is my favorite. Sadly used motor oil is very intense on everything it touches so the work didn't last for long. I haven't got the time to find a good alternative unfortunately. Maybe I will in the future. The motor oil just gives it an amazing colour gradient.

#engineering #lightart #mechanical #art #light

creator: @cinemahow
caption:
Is Samurai Jack the most aesthetic cartoon ever?

This series is an absolute work of art from start to finish. Often presenting its story through aesthetic visuals rather than traditional exposition, the show's artist drew inspiration primarily from traditional art forms rather than the standard cartoonish style of animation. Part of this is the application of the 60:30:10 color rule, a golden standard in design and art which breaks the frame into a dominant color (60%), a secondary color (30%) and an accent color (10%).

creator: @simon2940
caption:
It's not often we get to see detached solar prominences, certainly not ones that sustain for this long. This time lapse is over the course of 1 hour compressed down into seconds.

Super heated plasma is held in place, high above the chromosphere of the sun. Magnetically locked into place by unseen forces, waiting to be released.
